settings.title: Modern Farmhouse
settings.description: The modern farmhouse aesthetic has captivated homeowners, architects, and designers alike, blending rustic charm with contemporary sophistication. This design style, rooted in traditional American farmhouses, has evolved beyond its pastoral origins into a refined, high-end architectural movement.

settings.title: Arrowcreek Lodge
settings.description: Tucked away inside the exclusive Torreon gated community in Show Low, Arizona, Arrowcreek Lodge is a luxurious private retreat that seamlessly blends rustic charm with refined design. Vaulted ceilings with natural wood beams create an airy mountain ambiance, while stone and timber details flow effortlessly from exterior to interior. The home’s warm, organic palette is beautifully grounded by Creative Mines Whitegold, Orchard Limestone, adding luminous texture and timeless elegance to this serene forest escape.

settings.title: Corona Del Mar Contemporary
settings.description: This contemporary Newport Beach home was designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, embracing the region’s year-round coastal climate. Created in collaboration with architect AMK Studio and built by Burkhart Brothers, the residence showcases a bold mix of materials that balance sophistication with warmth. Interior detailing by Sol Interiors enhances the home’s refined aesthetic, creating a space that feels both elevated and effortlessly livable.

settings.title: D.O.G Pub
settings.description: Tays & Co Design Studio was awarded 9 different awards from Midwest Home Magazine, including 1st for Interior Use of Stone and 2nd for Exterior Use of Stone.   This project featured a Creative Mines Mixology of Coyote Farmhouse Ledge and Coyote Foothill Rubble.

settings.title: English Country
settings.description: Designed to embody timeless European charm, The English Country Home by Modern Nest offers a serene escape beneath the mountains of Paradise Valley. Featuring extensive use of Creative Mines Greypearl Orchard Limestone with a heavy overgrout technique, the home evokes old-world craftsmanship with a modern sensibility.

settings.title: Garrison Luxury Apartments
settings.description: Garrison is a luxury apartment community that embodies modern living in one of Orange County’s most vibrant neighborhoods. With curated amenities and a location near Angel Stadium and the Honda Center, Garrison balances stay-at-home comfort with access to everything the city offers.

settings.title: Honey Built Home
settings.description: Custom home designed by Christine from Honey Built Home features a unique 50/50 mixology of Alpaca and Timberwolf Orchard Limestone, grouted with Spec Mix White Mortar in an overgrout application.  The home exterior also features an extensive use of Creative Mines Loft Paintgrade Brick which was painted with Romabia Masonry Paint.

settings.title: Parr House | Cotino
settings.description: A defining landmark within the Cotino community, The Parr House expresses Mid-Century Modern design through its honest use of glass, steel, and stone. With floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking Cotino Bay, the space blurs the line between interior and landscape, a true reflection of modern desert living.

settings.title: Quarry Trails
settings.description: Quarry Trails reimagines mixed-use living through the lens of modern design and natural connection. Set against 220 acres of untamed parkland, this vibrant community blends residential and commercial architecture with outdoor recreation — from kayaking and rock climbing to mountain biking and beyond. Creative Mines stone brings a cohesive warmth and authenticity to every structure, reinforcing the enduring character of place.

settings.title: Shawnee Rambler on the Green
settings.description: Modern Farmhouse design has evolved beyond the traditional rustic aesthetic into something more refined, sophisticated, and enduring. Tays & Co Design Studio created this inviting home rooted in organic textures, natural materials, and a palette that is both warm and contemporary.

settings.title: Twin Peaks
settings.description: This Scandinavian-inspired home was crafted through the vision of the homeowner and Workaday Architects. Locally sourced cedar—some finished with the Shou Sugi Ban technique—sets a warm, organic tone, while the use of Creative Mines Loft Paintgrade Brick introduces a refined, modern counterpoint. The juxtaposition of tactile cedar and smooth brick defines the home’s character: natural yet disciplined, bold yet serene. Located just minutes from downtown Whitefish.
